debug_info.goal:
case succ.cons
α : Type u_1
elt : α
idx' : ℕ
HR :
  ∀ {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {hidx : idx' < l.length},
    (l.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (l.set idx' l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length l)).sum + l1.length) elt
l1 hd : List α
tl : List (List α)
HR2 :
  ∀ {hidx : idx' + 1 < tl.length},
    (tl.set (idx' + 1) (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (tl.set (idx' + 1) l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take (idx' + 1) (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) elt
hidx : idx' + 1 < (hd :: tl).length
⊢ hd ++ (tl.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
    (hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten).insertIdx (hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
      elt

failed_attempts:
have htl : idx' < tl.length := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx
          have := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := htl))
          simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using congrArg (fun t => hd ++ t) this

have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [List.length_cons] using hidx
          have := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := hidx'))
          simpa [List.flatten, List.map_cons, List.take_succ_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using congrArg (fun x => hd ++ x) this

have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] using hidx
          have := HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := hidx')
          rw [this]
          simp [list_insertIdx_length (l1 := hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten) (l2 := []) (idx := hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)]

have htl : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [List.length_cons, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] using hidx
          have := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := htl))
          rw [this]
          simp [List.flatten, List.insertIdx, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]

have htl : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [List.length] using hidx
          simpa [List.take, List.map, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using
            (congrArg (fun t => hd ++ t) (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := htl))
              |>.trans (by
                simpa [List.insertIdx, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] ))

have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [List.length] using hidx
          have hrec :
              (tl.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
                (tl.set idx' l1).flatten.insertIdx
                  ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) elt :=
            HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := hidx')
          rw [hrec]
          rw [list_insertIdx_length
            (l1 := hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten)
            (l2 := [])
            (idx := hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
            (hidx := by
              simpa using (Nat.le_refl (hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length))
            )
          ]
          simp

have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] using hidx
          have IH := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := hidx'))
          -- Rewrite the tail using the IH, then lift insertion through the head prefix.
          rw [IH]
          rw [← list_insertIdx_length (l1 := hd) (l2 := (tl.set idx' l1).flatten) (idx := (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
            (hidx := by
              have : (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum ≤ (List.map List.length (List.take idx' tl)).sum := by
                simp
              exact Nat.le_trans (list_take_sum_le (l := List.map List.length tl) (idx := idx')) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
            )]
          simp [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]

have htl : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] using hidx
          have := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := htl))
          rw [this]
          simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]

rw [list_insertIdx_length
            (l1 := hd) (l2 := (tl.set idx' l1).flatten) (idx := hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
            (hidx := by

              · exact Nat.le_add_right _ _
              · exact Nat.le_add_right _ _

have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := by
            simpa [Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] using hidx
          have := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := hidx'))

have hidx' : idx' < tl.length := by

          have := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := hidx'))
          -- rewrite using induction hypothesis, then reassociate and use insertIdx over append
          simpa [List.map_cons, List.take_succ_cons, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using
            (by
              rw [this]
              -- move insertIdx out of the appended prefix
              simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using

                    simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using this))

have htl : idx' < tl.length := by

          have Hrec := (HR (l := tl) (l1 := l1) (hidx := htl))
          -- rewrite the recursive part and then push insertIdx through the prefix `hd`
          simpa [List.insertIdx, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using congrArg (fun t => hd ++ t) Hrec
